name: obsidian-latex-suite-bridge
description: Bring Obsidian LaTeX Suite features (regex snippets, auto-fraction, tabout) to VS Code for .tex files.

commands.title: Obsidian LaTeX Suite: Expand Regex Snippet

obsidianLatexSuite.obsidianDataJsonPath.description: Absolute path to Obsidian LaTeX Suite plugin `data.json`.

obsidianLatexSuite.autoExpandRegexSnippe.description: Auto-expand Obsidian snippets with the 'A' option in .tex files.

obsidianLatexSuite.overrideTab.description: Override Tab in .tex files to run Obsidian tabout/regex expansion before falling back to the normal Tab behavior.

obsidianLatexSuite.tabout.enabled.description: Enable tabout (Tab jumps over closing delimiters like ')', '}', ']', '$'). Only used when overrideTab is enabled.

obsidianLatexSuite.autofraction.enabled.description: Enable Obsidian-style auto-fraction when '/' is typed in math mode.

obsidianLatexSuite.autofraction.breaking.description: Legacy compatibility setting. The Obsidian data.json value remains the runtime source of truth.

keybindings.when: editorTextFocus && !editorReadonly && (editorLangId == latex || editorLangId == tex) && resourceExtname == .tex && config.obsidianLatexSuite.overrideTab
